headline: 12 Zeros and 1 Musk: The Trillionaire Era Officially Begins.
summary: Tesla  and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, already the world’s richest person, is now the world’s first trillionaire.  On Wednesday, his rocket company, SpaceX, released its initial public offering registration statement to the public.  Musk’s Tesla stock, including his 2018 vested stock options, is currently worth about $290 billion.

content.title: 12 Zeros and 1 Musk: The Trillionaire Era Officially Begins.
content.summary: Tesla  and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, already the world’s richest person, is now the world’s first trillionaire.  On Wednesday, his rocket company, SpaceX, released its initial public offering registration statement to the public.  Musk’s Tesla stock, including his 2018 vested stock options, is currently worth about $290 billion.

headline: Why the SpaceX Hype Isn’t Boosting Tesla Stock
summary: Shares have been listless lately as investors have given SpaceX more of their attention.  Investors have also turned their attention to SpaceX, which made its IPO registration public on Wednesday.  Tesla CEO Elon Musk, of course, runs both companies, and Tesla was mentioned in the filing almost 90 times.

content.title: Why the SpaceX Hype Isn’t Boosting Tesla Stock
content.summary: Shares have been listless lately as investors have given SpaceX more of their attention.  Investors have also turned their attention to SpaceX, which made its IPO registration public on Wednesday.  Tesla CEO Elon Musk, of course, runs both companies, and Tesla was mentioned in the filing almost 90 times.
